excerpts.excerpt:
CURTIS
We've gotta fill this hall tonight. A lot
of young children are depending on it.
STEVE
Young children? Why, whaddya mean?
GAS STATION
OWNER
We're outta gas.
ELWOOD
Yep, mind if we fill er up?
OWNER
Nope. I said we're outta gas. Tanker trucks
late. Shoulda been here two hours ago. It's
always late on Thursdays.
ELWOOD
Well uh... I'll guess we'll have to wait.
OWNER
Yeah.
A sports car with a blond female driver pulls up to the station.
BLONDE
(to Elwood)
Excuse me sir, yes you, could you fill it
up with premium please and check under the
hood.
